_comment: SunoForge i18n English master token file. Keep in sync with index.html data-i18n attributes.
api.no_key_hint: Please provide either a Google AI Studio (cheaper) API key, an OpenRouter API key (more models / more expensive), or an Local OpenAI Compatible LLM Server address to use SunoForge.
api.cost_warning: SunoForge is not liable for any costs incurred using your selected model. Ensure you are using a free model or have a valid billing account.
hint.disclaimer: SunoForge is in no way affiliated with Suno or with the ownership collective of Suno.ai. The Suno name and logos are trademarks and service marks of Suno (collectively the "Suno Trademarks")
hint.tempo_tip: Tempo is a guide — the AI may adjust slightly to match genre and mood.
hint.vocal_config: Configure vocal characteristics. Unspecified fields will be chosen automatically by the song engine.
hint.instrumental: Instrumental track with no vocals. Section labels and performance directions will be provided instead of lyrics.
hint.structure: Choose a song structure for your selected genre. The AI will follow this flow exactly.
hint.structure_builder: Build a custom structure by adding blocks in order. Use the palette to add, reorder, or remove sections.
hint.sound_tab: Shape the production sound. Each selection is woven into the production notes and lyrics direction the AI generates.
hint.exclusions_tip: Exclusions are passed directly to the AI to steer it away from specific sounds, styles, or instruments.
hint.influences_tip: Key Influences / Sounds Like (Must be Suno compatible)
hint.lyrics_tab: Provide your own lyrics for the AI to work with.
lbl.custom_structure: Build a custom structure from scratch
lbl.lyrics_ai_action: What should the AI do with your lyrics?
ph.title: e.g. Dust & Thunder
ph.special_inst: Optional special instructions to the AI
ph.pov_custom: e.g. Omniscient narrator, Stream of consciousness...
ph.struct_name: Custom structure name (e.g. Cinematic Slow Burn)
ph.struct_desc: Optional description for this custom structure.
ph.struct_point: e.g. Epic Build, Ambient Pad, Rap Verse...
ph.exclusions: Comma-separated instrument and styles to exclude (e.g. banjo, trap, country)
ph.lyrics_input:
Paste or type your lyrics here...

Label sections like:
[Verse]
Your verse here...

[Chorus]
Your chorus...
ph.analysis_input: Paste lyrics, a style description, or both here...
empty.output_sub: Configure your song on the left and hit "Write My Song."
alert.no_google_key: Please enter a Google AI Studio API key.
alert.no_or_key: Please enter an OpenRouter API key.
alert.no_input: Please enter lyrics, style description, or both.
alert.validation_song: Please select at least one Genre or enter a Concept / Story before writing your song.
alert.no_struct_points: Add at least one structure point first.
alert.no_history: No songs in history to backup.
alert.import_backup_error:
Failed to import backup file. Please make sure it's a valid SunoForge backup file.

Error: {0}
alert.import_file_error: Failed to import file. Please make sure it's a valid SunoForge export file.
modal.validation.title: Required Field Missing
modal.lyrics_copy.title: Copy to Lyrics Tab
modal.lyrics_copy.body: This will overwrite any existing lyrics in the Lyrics tab with the generated lyrics. Continue?
modal.reset.title: Reset Settings
modal.reset.body: This will clear all your current song settings and reload the page. Any unsaved work will be lost.
modal.export.title: Export Song
modal.submit.title: Confirm Song Request
modal.submit.subtitle: Review the settings below before sending them to the AI.
modal.settings.title: Confirm Settings Update
modal.settings.subtitle: The following settings will be applied to the form.
modal.analyzer.title: Style & Lyrics Analyzer
modal.analyzer.subtitle: Enter lyrics (with or without structure), a style description, or both to auto-configure settings.
modal.analyzer.info_box: This analyzer will automatically extract song structure, update Genre, Mood, Tempo, Era, Production, Instrumentation, Mix & Influences across all tabs.
modal.backup.title: Backup History
modal.backup.security: Security Note: Only include your API key in a backup if you are storing it securely. Never share backups containing API keys publicly.
modal.lyrics_too_long.title: Lyrics Too Long
api.drive_hint: Google Drive storage creates or reuses a visible SunoForge folder in My Drive and stores SunoForge-managed JSON files there. API keys remain local to this browser.
alert.drive_missing_client_id: Enter a Google OAuth client ID for Drive sync first.
alert.drive_gis_unavailable: Google Identity Services did not load.
alert.drive_connect_failed:
Could not connect to Google Drive.

Error: {0}
